title: Fall Recovery Home Setup Plan for Safer Weeks Ahead
summary: Room-by-room safety changes you can make quickly after a fall.
body: Start with the bathroom and bedroom since these areas often carry the highest immediate fall risk during recovery.
Move daily-use items to waist height and clear walking paths wider than shoulder width.
Add non-slip mats, brighter night lighting, and stable handholds where turning or standing feels unsteady.
Create a short daily support plan covering rides, meals, medication pickup, and check-ins.
Reassess the setup after one week and adjust based on the tasks that still feel difficult or unsafe.

seo.title: Fall Recovery Home Setup Plan
seo.description: A practical home setup plan to reduce risk and support recovery after a fall.
